hero.title: A Pioneer in Digital Cultural Creativity

filmProduction.title: Film & TV Production
filmProduction.description: Produce films, series and documentaries across concept development, scriptwriting, fundraising, budgeting, filming, post-production and distribution.

culturalTravel.title: Wellness Travel & Study
culturalTravel.description: Blend wellness tourism with experiential learning through outdoor activities, cultural study and restorative programs for students and travelers.

creativeTrade.title: Creative Commerce
creativeTrade.description: Serve cultural art, design, media and digital content with integrated planning, exhibitions, creative operations and IP commercialization.

artistManagement.title: Artist Management
artistManagement.description: Provide artist branding, publicity, commercial booking and contract support through long-term collaboration with frontline performers.

industrialInvestment.title: Industrial Investment
industrialInvestment.description: Invest in cultural tourism, wellness towns and consumer brands with a long-term view on sustainable growth and diversified cultural business.

water.title: Dongjiangquan Natural Spring Water
water.description1: To mark the 60th anniversary of Dongjiang water supply to Hong Kong in 2025, Dunhua Group launched the Hong Kong brand Dongjiangquan Natural Spring Water.
water.description2: The water comes from the protected confluence of the Dongjiang and Ganjiang headwaters in southern Jiangxi, drawn from deep granite fissures and naturally rich in strontium and metasilicic acid.
water.description3: Certified by the Hong Kong Q-Mark scheme, it is ideal for daily drinking, tea brewing, soups and cooking.
water.feature1: Sourced 280 meters underground in southern Jiangxi
water.feature2: Naturally contains strontium and metasilicic acid
water.feature3: Certified by the Hong Kong Q-Mark quality scheme

byb.title: Bybanx BYB
byb.description1: BYB is a multifunctional digital asset ecosystem that connects real-world assets with Web3 application scenarios through the BYB token, utility NFTs and cultural-entertainment initiatives.
byb.description2: With Hong Kong as its strategic base, the platform is positioned for compliant, transparent and sustainable operation with strong long-term brand potential.
